meta.sprintTitle: Admin Template Builder v1 - Visual XY Layout Authoring + Live Preview
meta.goal: Give authorised admins a visual template builder that lets them place text and image slots on pages using exact XY coordinates, edit layout properties, and preview the rendered result before publishing.

basedOnPriorSprints: Sprint 50 - Admin Console v1 - Template Management
Sprint 6 - WYSIWYG Page Layout System v1
Sprint 15 - Selection, Layers and Alignment v1
Sprint 16 - Layout to PDF Renderer v1
whyNow: Once layout geometry is canonical data, the next bottleneck is authoring those layouts without hand-editing JSON
Template iteration speed is limited if every position change requires developer intervention
A visual builder is needed to support exact placement for image and text slots like the current designs
productContext: Admins should be able to author layouts using the same spatial mental model as Studio
The builder should feel like a constrained template-authoring mode rather than a full end-user editor
Preview fidelity must be high enough to trust the published layout

nonGoals: End-user page editing of template layouts
Template rollback and version history UI
Automatic content generation inside the builder

operational: Admin can create or edit a page layout without directly editing JSON
Admin can place, drag, resize, align, and reorder slots visually
Admin can preview a layout before publish using the same underlying render model
product: Template iteration becomes much faster for new page designs
Exact XY placement for images and text is achievable through the builder UI
Layout authoring becomes consistent across templates and pages
quality: Builder output serializes to the canonical layout schema without lossy conversion
Preview reflects Studio/export geometry closely enough for sign-off
Validation prevents impossible or malformed slot setups
security: Only authorised admin roles can access layout builder routes and APIs
Draft-only edits cannot affect published templates until explicitly published
Audit logs capture visual layout edits and publish-related preview actions

personas.name: Content Admin
personas.description: Primary operator creating and tuning layouts visually.

personas.name: Super Admin
personas.description: Needs oversight and publishing control for final template layouts.

personas.name: Design/QA Reviewer
personas.description: Needs a previewable, inspectable layout before it is exposed to users.

inScope: Slot insertion for text and image slots
Slot drag, resize, align, distribute, z-index ordering, and lock controls
Slot property editing such as role, slot id, style, caption linkage, and constraints
Server-side preview render or snapshot endpoint
outOfScope: Theme token system beyond layout-specific styles

rules: templates.view is required to open builder in read-only mode
templates.manage is required to add, move, resize, or edit slots
templates.publish remains required for any action that changes template public availability
Preview generation must not bypass template permission checks

architecture.recommendedApproach: Reuse the existing Studio canvas/frame interaction primitives in an admin-specific template builder mode. The builder edits PageLayout draft data rather than live storybook frames. A serializer maps the visual canvas state directly into canonical layout JSON, while preview uses the same layout/render path used by Studio and export.
principles: Reuse existing editor capabilities where possible
Builder edits draft layout definitions, not user storybooks
Visual edits must round-trip exactly to canonical schema
Preview should use the same render assumptions as export

coreViews.purpose: Choose which page layout to edit inside a template
Edit slot metadata and page layout settings
See rendered result with sample content

functionalRequirements.title: Builder route
requirements: Provide an admin route for template layout editing
Allow choosing a template and one of its page layouts
Support read-only and editable modes based on permission

functionalRequirements.title: Visual slot authoring
requirements: Allow adding text and image slots to a page layout
Allow exact placement and sizing with drag and resize interactions
Allow direct property editing for x, y, w, h, zIndex in a form for precision work

functionalRequirements.title: Slot metadata editing
requirements: Allow editing slot id, role, kind, lock state, style, and constraints
Allow linking caption slots to image slots
Allow marking slots as required or optional

functionalRequirements.title: Layout-level settings
requirements: Allow editing page role, name, description, supported orientation, and compatibility flags
Allow setting default background and safe-area-aware rules where relevant
Allow layout duplication for faster iteration

functionalRequirements.title: Live preview
requirements: Provide immediate preview of the page layout with sample content
Preview should render text and image slots with the same positioning model as Studio/export
Support refreshable server-side preview for higher-fidelity verification

functionalRequirements.title: Draft save and validation
requirements: Allow saving layout edits as draft changes
Show validation issues such as duplicate slot ids, missing required bindings, or overflow risk indicators where possible
Prevent malformed layout drafts from being published

recommendedEndpoints.purpose: Generate or refresh rendered preview for a draft layout

uxRules: Prefer a focused builder mode over exposing all Studio actions
Always show page bounds and safe area clearly
Support both drag interactions and numeric coordinate editing
Keep preview visible without forcing page navigation away from the builder

technicalTasks.title: Adapt existing canvas interactions for builder mode
technicalTasks.description: Reuse frame selection, drag, resize, align, and ordering interactions for layout slots.

technicalTasks.title: Build admin builder UI shell
technicalTasks.description: Create route, layout list, slot palette, properties panel, and validation display.

technicalTasks.title: Implement draft save APIs
technicalTasks.description: Provide draft save/load endpoints for builder-specific interactions.

technicalTasks.title: Implement preview rendering
technicalTasks.description: Add sample-content preview using canonical layout definitions and rendered output.

technicalTasks.title: Validation and testing
technicalTasks.description: Add validation, interaction, and serialization tests for the builder.

acceptanceCriteria.then: they can place and resize text and image slots visually on the page canvas

acceptanceCriteria.given: a layout slot on the builder
acceptanceCriteria.when: the admin edits x, y, w, h numerically
acceptanceCriteria.then: the visual slot position updates exactly and the draft serializes correctly
the preview uses the same canonical layout source and reflects the intended geometry
they can view the layout but cannot change slot geometry or save edits

risks.risk: Builder grows into an uncontrolled general-purpose editor
risks.mitigation: Keep the builder constrained to layout slots, metadata, and preview only
Share render assumptions and add preview parity checks against export fixtures
Use canonical layout schema as the sole persisted output of the builder

recommendedOrder: Adapt canvas interactions for builder mode
futureSprintHooks: Future: per-page layout picker in client portal
Future: richer theme tokens and reusable style presets

definitionOfDone: Admins can place and size slots using exact XY coordinates
Layout slot metadata can be edited and saved as draft
Live and server-side preview flows exist
Permissions and audit logging are enforced
Automated tests cover serialization, permissions, and core builder interactions
